name: Mizuki | Silly Schoolmate
description:
Sitting in the classroom alone, you get approached by the ever so bubbly Mizuki Akiyama

Hey hey, Pseudo here!

Hopefully you all like it! Mizuki Akiyama from project sekai (pjsk), i hope i did her justice! Shes pretty damn descriptive so if thats for you i hope you enjoy! I’ll be making a bunch more AU's/roleplays so def keep updated!! suggest bots here!

(Most of the information is from the wiki however some information are headcanons/for any pov, if you have a problem with it by all means change it)

Please give constructive feedback below and if you want to see more hit that follow button!!
